topic: Angel Park Handyman: High-Ticket Repair Packages for West-Side Homes, Gates, Trim, and Finish Work
excerpt: Angel Park is an established master-planned west Las Vegas neighborhood known for golf, open space, and single-family homes, so repairs tend to be visible: courtyard gates that drag, long stucco lines that show every patch, and exterior trim that looks cooked by late-day sun. Underneath, the valley’s native soils are shallow, well-drained alluvial soils with carbonates/caliche, which is why small movement can show up as latch drift, recurring drywall cracks, and fence sections going just a little out of square. Then Vegas does its usual number on the materials: extreme heat, strong UV, and monsoon-season storm bursts dry out sealants, stress hardware, and expose weak drainage details fast. Seasonally, summer bakes the finishes and storm days reveal the weak seams, so the durable fix is usually a bundled scope—align the openings, reinforce the finish work, correct the water path, and seal it back up properly. Most of the parts for this kind of work—hinges, sealants, trim stock, fasteners, patch materials—are easy enough to source on this side of town, but the clean finish match is where the real craft shows.
markdown_tables:
| High-ticket Angel Park package | What it usually includes | Representative total |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| West-side punch-list reset | doors, sliders, hardware, wall repair, trim, caulk, second-pass details | $2,500–$7,500 |
| Multi-room finish correction | recurring cracks, wide floats, texture blending, paint-ready cleanup | $2,000–$8,500 |
| Gate and perimeter package | courtyard/gate alignment, latch geometry, fence hardware, clean close | $2,000–$8,000 |
| Exterior trim and seal scope | sun-baked trim repairs, resealing, fascia/soffit touchpoints | $2,500–$9,500 |
| Water-control and storm-prep bundle | gutter corners, splash-back fixes, discharge corrections, exterior reseals | $2,000–$8,500 |
| Pre-listing high-visibility package | sightline repairs inside and out, plus final punch pass | $3,500–$12,000 |
